title: Ruby Mod
description: The title is a complete lie, this mod has way more than just ruby!
body:
Just Another Ruby Mod adds in some new ores, all of which can be found in the world. All of the ores have their own unique tools, weapons and armour sets. Meteorite for instance spawns fairly high in the world and occasionally there is a chance that one will fall from the sky. Some ores you will need to mine as close to bedrock as possible to find such as Amethyst and Braunite. Opal can be found fairly high in the world and finally Ruby can be found fairly common between y=8 and bedrock

The old ruby block texture was created by Silthulhu
